productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Dhoni Trainer White Shoe
description: If you want to train in style and with added comfort, your search ends with the reebok Dhoni Trainers. Endorsed by Indian cricket team captain M.H. Dhoni, they come with his signature, and are extremely lightweight. Engineered with the Hex Ride technology, they are the perfect shoes for all athletic activities or for a day out with friends. Upper Upper made of perforated synthetic combined with mesh for increased durability and breathability Synthetic stitched overlays for structuring the shoe Lushly padded tongue and collar for a snug Fit Central lacing with concealed eyelets to add to the style quotient Synthetic patch on the tongue with embossed series name Prominent perforations  on the toe box for better ventilation Embossed synthetic logo on the sides of the forefoot TPR outsole extended to the box and embedded on to it Brand name embossed on synthetic stitched overlay behind the collar Midsole Soft cushy footbed with Dhoni's signature printed on it for comfort and style In-built full foot HexRide technology offering a soft cushioning feel with the comfort of a lightweight ride Full length phylon midsole for lightweight technology Outsole Ergonomic comfort on the medial arch High-abrasion rubber outsole provides increased durability Outsole in bee hive pattern to offer superior traction Arched medial for ergonomic comfort Brand name etched on the heel cup with small flex grooves for superior traction Shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
